login.title: Login into your account

seoContent.title: SEO Content
seoContent.description: Manage meta tags, Open Graph, Twitter cards, and schema for pages. Cache is cleared automatically on update.
seoContent.confirmDeleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this SEO page?
seoContent.hintPageType: Kind of page: home, listing, vehicle, static, dealer, blog, etc. Used to match this SEO entry to the right page.
seoContent.hintPageKey: Unique identifier or slug for this page (e.g. home, vehicles, about, contact, privacy-policy, or a vehicle/dealer slug).
seoContent.hintTitle: Human-readable page title, e.g. for breadcrumbs or headings.
seoContent.hintMetaTitle: Title shown in the browser tab and in search results. Keep it under 60 characters.
seoContent.hintMetaDescription: Short summary for search results. Aim for 150–160 characters.
seoContent.hintMetaKeywords: Optional comma-separated keywords. Less important for SEO but still supported.
seoContent.hintCanonicalUrl: Preferred URL for this page to avoid duplicate content. Leave empty to use the current page URL.
seoContent.hintRobots: Search engine directives, e.g. index, follow or noindex, nofollow.
seoContent.hintOgTitle: Title when this page is shared on Facebook, LinkedIn, etc.
seoContent.hintOgDescription: Description shown when the page is shared on social networks.
seoContent.hintOgImage: Full URL of the image shown when the page is shared (e.g. on Facebook).
seoContent.hintTwitterTitle: Title used for Twitter card previews.
seoContent.hintTwitterDescription: Description used for Twitter card previews.
seoContent.hintTwitterImage: Full URL of the image used for Twitter cards.
seoContent.hintSchemaType: Type of structured data, e.g. Vehicle, Organization, WebSite, BreadcrumbList.
seoContent.hintSchemaJson: JSON-LD structured data for search engines. Must be valid JSON. Used for rich results and knowledge panels.
seoContent.hintContentHtml: Optional HTML block for extra SEO content rendered on the page.
seoContent.hintFaqJson: FAQ structured data as a JSON array (question/answer pairs) for FAQ rich results.
seoContent.hintBreadcrumbsJson: Breadcrumb trail as JSON for BreadcrumbList structured data.
seoContent.pageTypeKeyRequired: Page type and page key are required
